studied. While determining the profession most suited to a native
remember the following points:
C l) See the professions signified by the native's Ja nma Nakshatra.
( 2) See in which Nakshatra the tenth lord is placed.
( 3) 5ee the NalcShatra in whiCh the Bhava Madhya of the 10m house
falls.
The .above studied along with rules already discussed earlier show
the type of profession a native is likely to take.
Various professions signified by different Nakshatras are as flows:
(1) Ashwini: Doctors. service in factory. police. military, Surgery,
Jails. Machinery, Trading in Wool. Ghee, Rice. Iron. Steel,
Horse dea~rs etc.
(2) Bharani: Entertainment Industry. Chemists. Tobacco. Music,
Silk, Automobiles. Fertiliser industry, Veterinary Doctors.
Revenue and finance department. agriculturist, Civil
Engineers. trading In chillies. Medklne, Fadal creams, oUs etc.
